Consult endocrine for further management."},{"id":"5bf6d9e8-fb1d-4f0f-8be6-cd6ef8e957ad","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"highlight","text":"Cholesterol: 250 mg/dL *Lab H - dyslipidemia","group":"Understanding Your Results","rationale":"Cholesterol elevated above functional range (150-199 mg/dL), flagged for dyslipidemia, per page 2."},{"id":"ed07319a-bac1-4fbe-b802-732b54198188","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"note","text":"Your cholesterol (250) is high, which is often caused by low thyroid function. Correcting thyroid may lower cholesterol.","group":"Understanding Your Results","rationale":"Elevated cholesterol and hypothyroidism suggest a thyroid-driven dyslipidemia. Correct thyroid to improve cholesterol."},{"id":"1eeef6a8-45db-4e3f-bf22-52a0b17750a1","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"highlight","text":"Homocysteine: 11.6 µmol/L *H-Brain fog- methyl need","group":"Priority Actions - Next 30 Days","rationale":"Homocysteine at 11.6 µmol/L is high (optimal <7 µmol/L) indicating methylation issue, per page 3."},{"id":"85d5c6b6-4313-44c6-9559-1bcbe37b722c","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"note","text":"Start methylated B-Complex 1 cap daily. Request TPO/thyroglobulin abs. Remove gluten/dairy 30d. Liver US.","group":"Priority Actions - Next 30 Days","rationale":"High homocysteine needs methyl Bs. Antibodies test rules out autoimmunity. Diet/liver steps reduce inflammation. Page 3."},{"id":"869a8826-d1dc-42a7-82b1-2070a7782b33","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"highlight","text":"AST: 83 IU/L *Lab H - inflm tissues | ALT: 39 IU/L *Lab H - inflm liver","group":"Long-Term Strategy","rationale":"AST/ALT elevated above functional (AST 10-26, ALT 10-26), showing hepatic inflammation on page 4."},{"id":"ea36b470-7db0-427e-bb2e-6e8110a505fb","date":"05/23/26 10:30 AM","type":"note","text":"Target Free T3 >3.0, LDL <100, homocysteine <7, AST <26. Retest: 6-8wks (thyroid/liver), 3mo (lipids), 6mo (full panel).","group":"Long-Term Strategy","rationale":"Thyroid/liver optimization improves dyslipidemia. Support methylation/liver. Retest intervals per finding page refs."}]],"updatedon":"2026-05-23T08:53:21.4348824Z","_ts":1779526401,"highlightDataCard":[]}
